title: pyrus pollweriana
intro: Pyrus pollweriana, also known as the flowering pear, is a deciduous tree or shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus pollweriana include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pyrus pollweriana include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
